strengths: Active contributor to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, demonstrating hands-on engagement with agentic workflows and developer tooling for AI systems

Direct fintech-infrastructure experience at RIDE Capital (reshaping German investment practices) and Optilyz pricing systems, paired with high-throughput distributed-systems work at Dunnhumby handling millions of requests per second

13+ years across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems, including founding an event-driven open-source platform (GISCollective) with Kubernetes deployment — showing architectural breadth and entrepreneurial ownership
concerns: Career history is primarily individual-contributor and staff-level roles; explicit experience scaling engineering organizations from 10 to 30+ people is not documented
Multi-agent AI work is described at the infrastructure/tooling level rather than as production multi-agent systems making consequential financial decisions
No explicit executive-tier leadership title (VP/CTO) or board-level technical communication experience surfaced in the resume

key_factors.factor: Agentic AI and MCP tooling experience
Fintech and high-throughput distributed systems background

response.justification: Bogdan combines a rare trio for this role: current hands-on work on agentic AI infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, prior fintech exposure at RIDE Capital and pricing systems at Optilyz, and proven distributed-systems chops from Dunnhumby's millions-of-requests-per-second microservices environment. His founding of GISCollective — an event-driven, Kubernetes-deployable platform — demonstrates end-to-end architectural ownership aligned with the modular, event-driven multi-agent framework this CTO role demands. Cross-stack fluency (TypeScript, Node, DLang, C/C++) and a craftsmanship orientation (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, workshops he authored and taught) suggest he can both set engineering culture and remain technically credible with senior leaders, making him a strong upside candidate worth advancing to deeper conversation.
